basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rajkot (AIIMS Rajkot)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rajkot (AIIMS Rajkot) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 02 March 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Rajkot. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Rajkot Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD: 10 years, Govt Servant: 5 years, Ex-Serviceman: 5 years.

qualification.details: Educational qualification included in I or II Schedule or Part II of third Schedule to Indian Medical Council Act 1956/Persons with Disability Act. Postgraduate qualification e.g. MD/MS or recognized qualification equivalent thereto. For general discipline: Three years teaching and/or research experience in a recognized institution after obtaining MD/MS or qualification recognized equivalent thereto. For superspeciality: One year teaching/research experience after MD/MS.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Rajkot to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Rajkot Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Assistant Professor posts at AIIMS Rajkot is 04-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies for the Assistant Professor positions at AIIMS Rajkot.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a medical qualification included in the I or II Schedule or Part II of the third Schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, along with a postgraduate qualification like MD/MS/DM/MCh or equivalent.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Assistant Professor posts is 50 years, with age relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. ₹ 1,42,506/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for AIIMS Rajkot Assistant Professor Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
